case_title: WILLIAMS, CHAMPANGE MINOR et al VS EDGEWOOD-THE SAN FRANCISCO PROTESTANT ORPHANGE DBA et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR MINOR BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, CHAMPANGE   MINOR BROWN, PAULETTE  GUARDIAN AD-LITEM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EDGEWOOD-THE SAN FRANCISCO PROTESTANT ORPHANGE DBA EDGEWOOD CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES YAO, KEN KEN YAO IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, CHAMPANGE   MINOR BROWN, PAULETTE  GUARDIAN AD-LITEM AS TO DEFENDANT EDGEWOOD-THE SAN FRANCISCO PROTESTANT ORPHANGE DBA EDGEWOOD CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES YAO, KEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
